ddls:
CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* Parent industry ID for hierarchical categorization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the industry was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the industry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Revenues, Assets, Equity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the metric is collected (e.g., annually, quarterly) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the metric (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry ID for the data point */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Metric ID for the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data point was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data point was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenues" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue data point */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry ID for the revenue data point */,
  "sum_of_revenues" REAL /* Sum of revenues for the industry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the revenue data is recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the revenue data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the revenue data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the revenue data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the revenue data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenues_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset data point */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry ID for the asset data point */,
  "avg_of_assets" REAL /* Average of assets for the industry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the asset data is recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the asset data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the asset data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the asset data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the asset data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equity" (
  "equity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equity data point */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry ID for the equity data point */,
  "avg_of_equity" REAL /* Average of equity for the industry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the equity data is recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the equity data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the equity data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the equity data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the equity data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equity_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "net_income" (
  "net_income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each net income data point */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry ID for the net income data point */,
  "max_of_net_income" REAL /* Max of net income for the industry */,
  "min_of_net_income" REAL /* Min of net income for the industry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the net income data is recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the net income data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the net income data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the net income data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the net income data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("net_income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_net_income_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price data point */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry ID for the stock price data point */,
  "avg_of_stock_price" REAL /* Average of stock price for the industry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the stock price data is recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the stock price data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the stock price data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the stock price data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee data point */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry ID for the employee data point */,
  "sum_of_employees" INTEGER /* Sum of employees for the industry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the employee data is recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the employee data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the employee data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the employee data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the employee data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID for the access event */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Data point ID for the access event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_metrics" (
  "industry_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry-metric mapping */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry ID for the mapping */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Metric ID for the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_metrics_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Data point ID for the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_value" REAL /* Value of the data point for the version */,
  "version_source" TEXT /* Source of the version data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the version data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_versions_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., financial, market) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "report_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report version */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Report ID for the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the version */,
  "version_source" TEXT /* Source of the version data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
